tasks.subject: Layer O Task 1: OutputSink Protocol + slugify + registry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land the OutputSink Protocol, the slugify() pure helper, the format_filename() pure helper, the OutputPublishError exception, and the register_sink/get_sink registry — all without any concrete sink yet. Pure-function red-first.

**Files:**
- Create: src/kinoforge/outputs/__init__.py
- Create: src/kinoforge/outputs/base.py
- Create: tests/outputs/__init__.py
- Create: tests/outputs/test_slugify.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- slugify('Waves crashing on basalt cliffs at dusk!') == 'Waves-crashing-on-ba'
- slugify('🌊 ???') == 'clip'
- slugify('') == 'clip'
- slugify('a'*1000) length == 20 with no trailing -.
- slugify('café résumé') == 'caf-rsum'
- slugify('  ---  ') == 'clip'
- slugify('foo/bar\x00baz') == 'foo-bar-baz'
- slugify('multi---dashes') == 'multi-dashes'
- slugify('.hidden') == 'hidden'
- slugify('Waves crashing on ba!') == 'Waves-crashing-on-ba'
- OutputPublishError subclasses RuntimeError
- register_sink + get_sink registry round-trip; UnknownAdapter on miss

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/outputs/test_slugify.py -v

**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir.md Task 1

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/outputs/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/outputs/base.py", "tests/outputs/__init__.py", "tests/outputs/test_slugify.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/outputs/test_slugify.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["slugify typical prompt truncated", "slugify emoji-only falls back to clip", "slugify empty falls back", "slugify length cap 20 no trailing -.", "slugify accents dropped via ASCII encode", "slugify whitespace/dashes-only falls back", "slugify forbidden chars replaced with -", "slugify collapses runs of -", "slugify strips leading dot", "slugify no trailing dash after truncation", "OutputPublishError subclasses RuntimeError", "registry round-trip + UnknownAdapter on miss"], "specPath": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir-design.md", "planPath": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Layer O Task 2: LocalOutputSink with atomic write + collision suffix
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land the default LocalOutputSink(dir, clock) implementation, self-registered under 'local'. V1 writes bytes (hardlink optimization deferred); collision policy _2.._99 then 6-char sha256.

**Files:**
- Create: src/kinoforge/outputs/local.py
- Create: tests/outputs/test_local.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- publish writes <ts>_<slug><ext> at expected absolute path
- namespace nests under subdir + mkdir parents
- collision sequence _2.._99 then 6-char sha256
- read-only dir → OutputPublishError
- relative dir resolved at construction
- extension='' defaults to .bin
- import self-registers as 'local'
- atomic write via .tmp + os.replace
- clock.now() epoch rendered as local-TZ YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/outputs/ -v

**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir.md Task 2

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/outputs/local.py", "tests/outputs/test_local.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/outputs/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["publish writes <ts>_<slug><ext>", "namespace nests under subdir", "collision _2.._99 then sha256", "read-only dir → OutputPublishError", "relative dir resolved at construction", "extension='' defaults to .bin", "self-registers as 'local'", "atomic via .tmp + os.replace", "local-TZ TS conversion"], "specPath": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir-design.md", "planPath": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Layer O Task 3: OutputConfig pydantic block + Config.output field
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the YAML-level config block for the output dir, mirroring StoreConfig. Default-factory pattern so absent block uses sensible defaults.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/config.py (insert OutputConfig near StoreConfig ~line 421; add Config.output field ~line 447)
- Modify: tests/core/test_config.py (+3 round-trip tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- absent block defaults to kind='local', dir=Path('output'), enabled=True
- explicit block round-trips through load_config
- enabled=false round-trips as False

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -v

**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir.md Task 3

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/core/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["absent block defaults", "explicit block round-trips", "enabled=false round-trips"], "specPath": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir-design.md", "planPath": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Layer O Task 4: GenerateClipStage sink + namespace integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add sink: OutputSink | None = None and namespace: str | None = None fields to the stage dataclass; call sink.publish(...) after store.put_bytes when sink is not None. None default = bit-for-bit identical to today's behavior.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py (constructor fields ~line 82-90; run() tail ~line 170-177)
- Modify: tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py (+3 stage integration tests via _SpyOutputSink)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- sink=None preserves byte-for-byte behavior
- sink present → publish called once per artifact with prompt=segments[-1].prompt + extension=Path(filename).suffix + namespace propagated
- namespace constructor arg propagates to publish call
- multi-segment chained run still publishes only the final artifact

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py -v

**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir.md Task 4

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py", "tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sink=None preserves behavior", "sink present → publish called with right args", "namespace propagates", "chained run only publishes final artifact"], "specPath": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir-design.md", "planPath": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Layer O Task 5: orchestrator.generate() sink threading
tasks.description:
**Goal:** generate() gains sink: OutputSink | None = None kwarg; threads into GenerateClipStage constructor. None default keeps every existing call site working.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py (signature ~line 675-686; stage construction ~line 785-794)
- Modify: tests/core/test_orchestrator.py (+2 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- generate() without sink kwarg → stage built with sink=None
- generate(sink=spy) → spy.publish called per produced Artifact

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator.py -v

**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir.md Task 5

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default sink=None", "sink kwarg threads to stage"], "specPath": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir-design.md", "planPath": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Layer O Task 6: batch.batch_generate() sink + batch_id namespace
tasks.description:
**Goal:** batch_generate() gains a sink: OutputSink | None = None kwarg; _build_stage_for_entry passes sink + namespace=batch_id into the stage. All per-entry artifacts publish under <output_dir>/<batch_id>/.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/batch.py (_build_stage_for_entry signature + call; batch_generate signature)
- Modify: tests/test_batch_cli.py and/or tests/core/test_batch.py (+2 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- batch_generate without sink kwarg behaves as today
- batch_generate(sink=spy, batch_id='X') → publish called per entry with namespace='X'

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/test_batch_cli.py tests/core/ -v -k batch

**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir.md Task 6

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/batch.py", "tests/test_batch_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_batch_cli.py tests/core/ -v -k batch", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default sink=None", "sink + batch_id namespace propagation per entry"], "specPath": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir-design.md", "planPath": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Layer O Task 7: CLI flags + _build_sink + --run-id uniquification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** --output-dir PATH / --no-output-dir mutex flags on generate + batch; _build_sink(cfg, args) constructs the sink; --run-id default flips from 'run' to f'run-{ts}' (local TZ). _adapters.py imports kinoforge.outputs.local so the registry is populated.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/_adapters.py (one-line side-effect import)
- Modify: src/kinoforge/cli.py (parser ~line 119-198; _cmd_generate ~line 309-338; _cmd_batch)
- Modify: tests/test_cli.py (+5 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- --output-dir overrides YAML
- --no-output-dir → sink=None
- no flag + no YAML → cwd/output sink
- --output-dir + --no-output-dir → argparse mutex error
- default --run-id = run-<local-tz YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS>; two invocations produce distinct ids

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/test_cli.py -v

**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir.md Task 7

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/_adapters.py", "src/kinoforge/cli.py", "tests/test_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_cli.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["--output-dir overrides YAML", "--no-output-dir → None", "default = cwd/output", "mutex error on both", "--run-id uniquifies via _cli_clock"], "specPath": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir-design.md", "planPath": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Layer O Task 8: .gitignore + example YAML output blocks + round-trip tests
tasks.description:

**Files:**
- Modify: .gitignore
- Modify: examples/configs/{wan,diffusers,fal,hosted,local-fake,runpod-comfyui-wan}.yaml
- Modify: tests/test_examples.py (+6 round-trip tests parametrised across the YAMLs)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- .gitignore contains 'output/' line
- every example YAML carries commented output: block in canonical shape
- load_config() succeeds for every example; cfg.output at defaults

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/test_examples.py -v -k output

tasks.subject: Layer O Task 10: Full gate + SHA backfill + --no-ff merge to main
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run the full pre-commit + test gate; backfill commit SHAs into the PROGRESS Phase 25 task list; merge build/layer-o into main with a substantive --no-ff merge commit per project tradition.

**Files:**
- Modify: PROGRESS.md (backfill SHAs for Tasks 1-9, then the merge commit SHA)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- pre-commit green on all files
- full test suite green; +42 ±5 delta
- all _PENDING_ SHA markers replaced
- main has merge commit referencing Layer O

**Verify:** pixi run pre-commit run --all-files && pixi run test && git log --oneline main -5

**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-layer-o-output-dir.md Task 10
